text:
you don't need to pay for ElevenLabs & WisprFlow subscription anymore.

someone just open-sourced BOTH in one app. 

completely free. runs locally. no API keys. no usage caps.

→ clone any voice 
→ global dictation hotkey
→ your agent can talk back 
→ 7 TTS engines 
→ 23 https://t.co/M2C3HNAIks https://t.co/3G70hP5i9C
